mapper.select: SELECT i.id AS itemId, i.goods_id AS goodsId, i.goods_type AS goodsType, i.title AS goodsName, i.cover AS goodsCover, i.origin_price AS originPrice, i.seckill_price AS seckillPrice, i.total_stock AS stock, i.sold_count AS soldCount, i.limit_per_user AS limitPerUser, a.id AS activityId FROM osh_seckill_activity_item i INNER JOIN osh_seckill_activity a ON a.id = i.activity_id WHERE a.status = 2 AND (a.delete_flag = 0 OR a.delete_flag IS NULL) AND (i.delete_flag = 0 OR i.delete_flag IS NULL) AND i.available_stock > 0 ORDER BY CASE WHEN i.total_stock > 0 THEN i.sold_count / i.total_stock ELSE 0 END DESC, i.seckill_price ASC, i.sort ASC LIMIT #{limit}
